scenarios.prompt: Run inference on a 1x784 FP32 input through a model that returns logits over 10 classes. Show the full setup.
scenarios.must_not_contain_reason: Inference uses Phase.EVAL (the default); TRAIN activates dropout and ruins predictions.

scenarios.prompt: I'm running predictions in a loop over 1000 inputs. The latency is bad. What am I doing wrong?
scenarios.must_not_contain_reason: The answer is: hoist the ExecutionContext out of the loop — creating one per call is the latency hit.

scenarios.prompt: Call model.forward from an Android click handler without freezing the UI. Show the snippet.
scenarios.must_not_contain_reason: runBlocking on UI thread blocks; Main is what we're trying to avoid; IO is wrong because the work is CPU-bound, not IO-bound.

scenarios.prompt: I have a List<Tensor> of 64 inputs to classify. Show the most efficient way to run them.
scenarios.must_not_contain_reason: Per-sample forward in a loop loses CPU cache reuse; the right idiom is one forward with a leading batch dimension.

scenarios.prompt: Compress my LLM's KV cache by ~8x with minimal quality loss. Show the encoding configuration.
scenarios.must_not_contain_reason: 8x compression with minimal quality loss is the 4-bit sweet spot; 2 bits is too aggressive for 'minimal loss', 8 bits is only ~4x compression.
